    • Class app.gui.components.DynamicChartContainer

      class DynamicChartContainer extends InvisiblePanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • charts
          List<org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart> charts
          The list of charts managed by this container.
        • focusedChartIndex
          int focusedChartIndex
          The index of the currently maximized chart, or -1 if all charts are displayed.

    • Class app.gui.components.FullScreenFrame

      class FullScreenFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • isFullScreen
          boolean isFullScreen
          Tracks whether the window is currently rendering in full-screen mode.
        • screenBounds
          Rectangle screenBounds
          Caches the window bounds prior to toggling full-screen mode to allow faithful restoration.
        • screenState
          int screenState
          Stores the extended state window tracking flag (e.g., MAXIMIZED_BOTH).

      class InvisiblePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

    • Class app.gui.components.LabeledComponent

      class LabeledComponent extends InvisiblePanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • component
          JComponent component
          The actual interactive field or control component positioned on the right side of this panel layout.
        • label
          JLabel label
          The bold descriptor text label positioned on the left side of this panel layout.

    • Class app.gui.components.MenuTabButton

    • Class app.gui.views.SearchPanel

      class SearchPanel extends CardPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • assetComboBox
          JComboBox<String> assetComboBox
          Selection box identifying specific asset tracking types to query.
        • endDatePicker
          com.github.lgooddatepicker.components.DateTimePicker endDatePicker
          Interactive entry container setting the upper query datetime constraint limit.
        • granularityComboBox
          JComboBox<String> granularityComboBox
          Selection box mapping mathematical time tracking step sizes to data series rows.
        • mainPage
          MainPage mainPage
          Reference callback structure used to notify parent layers when new query responses are ready.
        • searchButton
          JButton searchButton
          The UI action button that runs contextual evaluation queries.
        • startDatePicker
          com.github.lgooddatepicker.components.DateTimePicker startDatePicker
          Interactive entry container setting the lower query datetime constraint limit.
